title: TISS Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Data Manager Posts
description: The Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Data Manager Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M.E./M. Tech in Computer Science Engineering, M.Sc., MBA, MCA, Post-graduation, can apply for the TISS Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode.
